title: Untamed Wilds (Unofficial Port)
description: A mod that aims to make the Minecraft world a bit more alive
body:
Requires: [Citadel (Unofficial Port)](https://modrinth.com/mod/citadel-(1.21.1-port))

**About This Port:**  
This port updates Untamed Wilds to Minecraft 1.21.1 and the NeoForge mod loader.

**Original Mod:**   
[Untamed Wilds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/untamedwilds) by [raytrace82](https://www.curseforge.com/members/raytrace82/projects)

**License:**  
This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3), inheriting the license from the original mod.

**Credits:**  
Original Mod Authors  
[raytrace82](https://www.curseforge.com/members/raytrace82/projects) (Lead Developer)

**Disclaimer:**
This is an unofficial community port. All credit for the original mod design, artwork, models, and code goes to the original team.

**Support:**
For issues specific to this 1.21.1 port, please report them to the github repo linked on this page.
